description: Extra secret patterns scanned in the built bundle beyond the hard-coded defaults. The scanner always applies the built-in patterns (Supabase service-role keys, Resend keys, OpenAI/Anthropic keys, generic service_role JWTs); entries here are PROJECT-SPECIFIC patterns that should never appear in the client bundle. Any hit is a Blocker finding per requirements.md §13.7.

patterns.name: cron-secret-literal
patterns.description: The CRON_SECRET env var name leaking into the client bundle would indicate the cron secret itself is referenced from client code.

patterns.name: supabase-access-token-literal
patterns.description: SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN is a personal access token used by the CLI and MUST NEVER appear in the client bundle.
